## Maintainer checklist (see [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md))

- [ ] PR is from a **feature branch**, not direct commits to `master`.
- [ ] Change set is **small and scoped** to one clear outcome (easy review and rollback).
- [ ] **New or materially changed dbt marts**: note tests run (`dbt parse` / `dbt test` / etc.) or what validation you did.
